parameters.name: Sample Group Column Name
parameters.description: Column name distinguishing sample groups in the input sample metadata file
parameters.help_text: The column from the sample metadata containing the sample group information. This is usually a column showing to which experimental treatments each sample belongs (e.g. WildType, Knockout, Tumor, Normal, Before, After, etc.).

parameters.name: Label Column Name
parameters.description: The column name describing sample names in your input metadata file
parameters.help_text: The column from the sample metadata containing the sample labels as you wish them to appear in the plots produced by this template. This can be the same Sample Names Column. However, you may desire different labels to display on your figure (e.g. shorter labels are sometimes preferred on plots). In that case, select the column with your preferred Labels here. The selected column should contain unique names for each sample. (Default– sample_id)
